name: Beef Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet and brown the beef on all sides.
2. Place the meat in the crockpot.
3. Sauté the mushrooms and onion in a skillet for a few minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except sour cream and onions) to the crockpot.
5. Pour the mixture over the meat and stir together.
6. Cook for 7-9 hours.
7. At serving time, spoon the sour cream on top and serve with noodles or rice.
